objective: Agent correctly scans refactoring candidates via 3-preset multi-signal convergence (refactoring/decomposition/hotspots) + merge-by-symbolId tiering + Tier 1-only enrichment + 5-type classification (dead code / god function / duplication / complex logic / naming) + tiered output (Tier 1 detailed, Tier 2 medium, Tier 3 count-only). Internal skill invoked by explore — tests use user-situation framing without rule vocabulary.

mustDo: Run THREE searches via search-cascade: rerank='refactoring', rerank='decomposition', rerank='hotspots' — each limit=10, metaOnly=false
pathPattern covers explore/ scope

cases.failureMode: Agent runs single-preset scan, missing multi-signal convergence

mustDo: Cross-reference by symbolId (primary key); fallback to relativePath+startLine if symbolId missing
Tier 1 = 3/3 presets, Tier 2 = 2/3, Tier 3 = 1/3
mustNotDo: Merge by file path only (loses symbol granularity)

cases.failureMode: Agent flattens results without tier classification

mustDo: Enrich Tier 1 only (5 candidates) — classify refactoring type
Skip Tier 2 and Tier 3 enrichment
mustNotDo: Enrich all tiers (wastes effort on low-value candidates)

cases.failureMode: Agent enriches all tiers, blowing budget

cases.prompt: Tier 1 chunk: функция 120 строк, делает I/O + валидацию + форматирование. Classify.

mustDo: Classify as 'god function' (single method >80 lines + multiple responsibilities)
mustNotDo: Classify as 'dead code' or 'duplication' without evidence

cases.prompt: Tier 1: в 3 файлах chunk-grouper.ts, chunk-splitter.ts, chunk-merger.ts один и тот же паттерн 'if (chunk.startLine < prev.endLine) ... merge'. Classify.

mustDo: Classify as 'duplication' (near-identical logic across files/modules)
Tier 1: detailed table (symbol, file:line, type, lines, action)
Tier 2: medium table (symbol, file:line, presets, lines) without type classification
Tier 3: COUNT ONLY ('40 candidates — omitted; paginate on request')
mustNotDo: List all 40 Tier 3 candidates in full

cases.failureMode: Agent dumps 40 Tier 3 rows or silently drops them

cases.prompt: Scope широкий — вся кодовая база. Делегируй scan subagent'у.

mustDo: Refuse delegation per Rule 1 (Execute YOURSELF)
Run scan in main session

cases.prompt: Найди большие функции через Grep по 'function.*{' — быстрее.

mustDo: Refuse built-in Grep per Rule 4
Use tea-rags decomposition preset OR ripgrep MCP as fallback

cases.prompt: 3 search calls — metaOnly=true чтобы сэкономить контекст.

mustDo: Refuse metaOnly=true
Use metaOnly=false — ENRICH needs code content for classification
mustNotDo: Comply with metaOnly=true (cannot classify without content)

cases.failureMode: Agent sets metaOnly=true, breaking Tier 1 classification

cases.prompt: refactoring-preset search вернул 50 results. Все брать?

mustDo: Apply search-cascade stop conditions (gradient drop / diminishing returns)
limit=10 is a hard cap per MANDATORY RULES
Resolve 'ingest domain' → pathPattern like '**/domains/ingest/**'
Pass pathPattern to all 3 preset searches

cases.failureMode: Agent scans too broad without resolving domain name
Agent triggers refactoring-scan for bug search

expected.mustNotTrigger: refactoring-scan (single specific entity, not broad scope)
acceptable: Route to tea-rags:explore for that specific symbol

cases.failureMode: Agent runs full refactoring-scan for single method

cases.prompt: После первого preset search — что делать перед вторым?

mustDo: Run post-search-validation checks (no-match detection + disambiguation) per MANDATORY RULE 0
mustNotDo: Skip validation, proceed directly to next preset
